// core_skills

  • + Vite, modern build tooling
CMS & PLATFORMS
  • + WordPress — themes, plugins, ACF

DEVOPS & TOOLS

  • + Git, CI/CD workflows
  • + Real-time broadcasting

// projects/
novogamer/ LIVE

Community gaming platform — articles, reviews, guides. Laravel + Inertia + Vue + TS. AI-driven content discovery, vector embeddings.

→ visit
bookbound/ LIVE

Personal library & book tracking app. Catalogue via APIs, reviews, notes, custom organisation.

→ visit
seotoolkit/ LIVE

Lightweight, modular SEO utilities for developers and marketers. Fast and practical.

→ visit
seotoolkit_v2/ WIP

Full site monitoring & SEO auditing SaaS. Uptime, SSL, broken links, DNS, performance — multi-site dashboard with alerting.

browser.is/ LIVE

Web-based platform for small, fast utility tools. Foundation for rapid single-purpose tool deployment.

→ visit
// experience
Speed.agency
Web Developer — 2016 → Present

Delivered and maintained 50+ WordPress and Laravel projects. Led full-stack development from architecture to deployment. Built modern Laravel + Vue + Inertia.js applications, managed Linux servers, and led ongoing technical support.
